start.vercelSignin: Jolly runs the Vercel sign-in (`vercel login`) with you up front, before the unattended stages.
start.stripeFinal: Last step is yours, once Jolly's done: paste the Stripe keys in the Saleor Dashboard.
start.proceed: Build your store now? This creates the store, storefront, and deployment.
start.declined: Stopped before building anything. Nothing was created.
start.reusingConfiguredStore: Reusing your already-configured store ({storeUrl}); resuming the remaining stages.
start.previewedPlan: Previewed the plan. No files were written and no changes were made.
start.prompt.organization: Choose the Saleor organization to use
start.prompt.store: Create a new store, or reuse an existing one?
start.close.notFinished: Setup did not finish — the {stages} {stageWord} did not complete{reasons}.
start.close.reRun: Re-run `jolly start` to finish the remaining stages.
start.close.keepStorefront: storefront/ — your storefront, live on Vercel (pnpm dev, npx vercel)
start.close.keepRecipe: recipe.yml — your catalog & store config as code (npx @saleor/configurator)
saleorUrl.clarification: That doesn't look like a Saleor URL I can use. Could you paste your Saleor Dashboard URL, GraphQL API URL, or root Saleor Cloud URL (for example https://your-store.eu.saleor.cloud)?
